inline_comments.message: I was thinking we change the policy-common-alpine image, so the rest of the images have this in there.

I didn't want to touch the common base images since they are already released as 1.4.0 and will have to go through the snapshot to release process again for them and retest them (there may have been changes in the OS underneath that we will be picking up, so there's the possibility of issue as the openjdk one we hit a while ago).    Note that the apex-pdp has in its Dockerfile.  I think we should go through an exercise of reorganizing the images along the lines of the comment I made in https://jira.onap.org/browse/INT-995?focusedCommentId=38448&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels:comment-tabpanel#comment-38448 in the beginning of a release.
